description: Create a View Package. By default it writes a persistent package under the selected Unity project at Locus/views/<view-id>. Set temporary=true for one-off display Views; Locus writes them under the app temp directory, appends a unique suffix to the requested id, keeps them out of the user-visible View registry, and returns the actual id plus packageRoot. Use this only inside the /view workflow. Use normal file tools to read or edit files inside packageRoot.

id.description: Lowercase kebab-case View id, for example material-inspector.

name.description: Display name for the View. Defaults to a title generated from id.

template.description: Built-in View template to copy. Supported values: blank, inspector-form, node-graph, link-board, lua-gc-monitor.

icon.description: Optional Locus icon library name for the View list. Defaults by template.

temporary.description: Create a one-off View package outside Locus/views. Temporary Views can be opened with the returned id but do not appear in view_list or the user-visible View tree.
